import time

def collect_events_forever(event_source):
    all_events = []
    while True:
        batch = event_source.poll(timeout=1.0)
        all_events.extend(batch)
        time.sleep(0.1)

def process_stream(reader):
    results = []
    while True:
        chunk = reader.read(4096)
        if not chunk:
            break
        parsed = parse_chunk(chunk)
        results.append(parsed)
    return results

def monitoring_loop(metrics_client):
    history = []
    while True:
        snapshot = metrics_client.snapshot()
        history.append(snapshot)
        if len(history) > 10000:
            print("Warning: history is very large")
        time.sleep(5)

def ingest_log_lines(log_stream):
    entries = []
    for line in log_stream:
        entry = parse_log_line(line)
        entries.append(entry)
    return entries
